name: Reuben Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a small saucepan of water to boiling. Add sauerkraut and let stand for 10 minutes. Drain.
2. Beat eggs, egg whites, water, salt, and pepper in a bowl until blended.
3. Heat a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add half a tablespoon of butter and half the chopped onions.
4. Cook for 5 seconds, swirling the pan to coat the bottom. Use a spatula to lift the edges of the egg mixture, letting any uncooked egg run under the surface.
5. Continue cooking until the egg is set on top, about 1 to 2 minutes.
6. Sprinkle half of the shredded Swiss cheese, sauerkraut, and chopped corned beef over the center of the omelet.
7. Fold the omelet in half using a spatula. Transfer to a plate.
8. Repeat steps 3-7 with the remaining ingredients to make a second omelet.
